games.name: Brawl Stars
games.spaceNote: Spaces are allowed in Brawl Stars display names.
games.applySteps: Profile → Settings (gear) → Change Name → paste → confirm in preview → save.

games.name: Free Fire
games.spaceNote: Avoid spaces — many players report paste failures with spaced IGNs.
games.applySteps: Profile → tap name/pen icon → paste in rename field → confirm.

games.name: PUBG Mobile
games.spaceNote: No-space nicknames paste more reliably across mobile clients.
games.applySteps: Lobby → Profile → Edit → paste nickname → save.

games.name: Valorant
games.spaceNote: Riot ID display names can include spaces within the game-name portion.
games.applySteps: Riot Client → Profile → Riot ID → edit game name → paste → save.

games.name: Fortnite
games.spaceNote: Epic display names generally accept spaces; verify in the in-game preview.
games.applySteps: Epic account → Display Name → paste → save, then confirm in Fortnite profile.

games.name: Roblox
games.spaceNote: Usernames without spaces copy cleanly between mobile and desktop.
games.applySteps: Account Settings → Username (or Display Name where supported) → paste → save.

styles.name: Bold Serif
styles.vibe: strong and readable in fast-moving UI

styles.name: Sans Bold
styles.vibe: modern and legible at small sizes

styles.name: Bubbles
styles.vibe: playful but may box out in some games — checker flags it
